content: I forgot my Claude password and can't log in. I've tried the password reset but haven't received the email yet. What should I do?
Someone made an unauthorized charge of $500 to my Claude account. I don't recognize this transaction and want a refund immediately. This might be fraud.
How do I enable two-factor authentication on my Claude account for better security?
My team needs access to a private assessment on HackerRank. How do I grant permissions to specific team members?
I was charged twice for my Visa card payment on the same day. This appears to be a duplicate charge. I need this resolved and want a chargeback if necessary.
How does the grading work on HackerRank coding assessments? I submitted a solution but my score seems incorrect.
I can't access the billing dashboard for Claude. I just want to check my recent invoices and payment method.
My account appears to be hacked! I see login attempts from countries I've never been to, and my API key might be compromised. Please help immediately!
What are the different pricing tiers for Claude API, and how is usage billed exactly?
I want to cancel my Claude subscription. What happens to my saved progress and certificates?
